```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.6em 1fr;gap:0.95em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.95em;font-weight:900;">✓</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Assistants vs Agents</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;"><strong style="color:#2C3E50;">Agent = LLM + tools + loop.</strong></div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.6em 1fr;gap:0.95em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.95em;font-weight:900;">✓</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Architecture</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Working dir = scope. <strong style="color:#2C3E50;">4 components.</strong> Plan first.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.6em 1fr;gap:0.95em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C4881A,#FFB84D);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.95em;font-weight:900;">✓</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Handy Tools</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">No must-install kit. <strong style="color:#2C3E50;">Speak clearly.</strong></div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
